overview: Complete evaluation infrastructure for the SAFe Feature Spec System using content-addressed prompt storage, token tracking per LLM call, and a 5-tab dashboard with golden set testing, cost breakdown, and Claude-powered prompt improvement suggestions.

keyPoints.title: Content-addressed prompt storage prevents duplicate versions
SQLite three-table schema balances simplicity and queryability
LLM-as-judge variance requires multiple runs for reliable baselines
Claude analyzes weak sections and proposes targeted prompt edits
Bare/boosted spread quantifies value of stakeholder-provided context
